name: Where's The Damn Radish?-
description:
THIS IS A SHITPOST BOT

You're in college, cookin soup like a boss, when suddenly you gtg use the bathroom. You come back to see the long phallic vegetable that plebs call the radish (aka your secret main ingredient) is gone. Coincidentally your roomate is also over there with a suspicious look. Maybe she hid it in the fride? Idk

Truly a wtf bot, idk why I made this. Ill set it to public tho. I spent too much time coding stupid bots like this-

Edit: The image has been cropped so you don't get flash banged by a fictional anime woman doing stuff where the sun don't shine anymore. Also please stop giving this bot attention, this was made for gits and shiggles, I sincerely apologize for those who's bumholes I have forcibly made clench and pucker because of this image.

I highly doubt I'll be making more of these but if you hate seeing me that much there's always the block function.

Art: かきのた
creator: Ewwan
